description: E2E reconcile test fixtures for get_account_balance output1. Covers broker/local match, local-only, broker-only, and quantity mismatch scenarios.

match_only.description: broker holds exactly match local holds — no reconcile action needed

local_only.description: local HOLD exists for 005930 but broker shows zero qty — should force-close

broker_only.description: broker holds 000660 but local has no HOLD — should warn, not auto-insert

quantity_mismatch.description: both sides hold 035420 but quantities differ — should warn, not auto-correct

broker_fetch_error.description: placeholder — broker API returns error. Tests use rt_cd != 0 directly.
